title: Using Claude Code as a Subprocess Provider for Automated Code Review
description: Spawning Claude Code CLI as a child process in Node.js, treating it as an interchangeable provider alongside OpenAI and Anthropic APIs. Covers binary discovery, the streaming JSON protocol, tool handling asymmetry, and sandboxing.

title: Why Your RAG's Source of Truth Shouldn't Be a Vector Database
description: Markdown files as source of truth, vector index as disposable cache. A case study from homeclaw on filesystem-first RAG with privacy-by-path, two-layer context, and graceful degradation.

title: Eridanus: Knowledge Context Surfacing
description: How real-time meeting translation meets enterprise knowledge retrieval. An interactive course covering the KnowledgeSource interface, Glean integration, conversation state tracking, and the surfacing gate.
